_meta.description: Original progress bar character sets created for this repository. Includes at least one bar style for every progress bar group used in progress-indicators.json.

asciiRelay.notes: High-contrast ASCII style for terminals without Unicode support.

blockForge.notes: Dense block fill with explicit head character.

geometricCrystals.notes: Diamond-based bar with a distinct leading edge.

decorativeSpark.notes: Ornamental style intended for playful CLI output.

phasedMoon.notes: Five-phase smooth fill using moon-like circular glyphs.

emojiTraffic.notes: Simple traffic-light semantics for status-rich progress displays.
